query:
SELECT DISTINCT ON (workspace_id, path)
               workspace_id AS "workspace_id!", path AS "path!", content AS "content!"
        FROM script
        WHERE auto_kind = 'pipeline'
          AND archived = false
          AND deleted = false
          AND content ILIKE '%freshness%'
          -- Workspace archival stops all execution but leaves script rows
          -- intact for unarchival; without this the watchdog would keep
          -- resurrecting runs in a workspace the admin shut down.
          AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM workspace w
                      WHERE w.id = script.workspace_id AND w.deleted = false)
        ORDER BY workspace_id, path, created_at DESC
